JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER CARLITO MANDIA. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2003 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 303, PERKER L MEEKS.

REMOVED FROM JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-14-2003 - CASE SETTLED BY SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT READ INTO THE COURT RECORD AND REPORTED. WRITTEN FORM OF SAME TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT AT A LATER DATE. PERKER MEEKS, JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; SUSAN LEE, CSR. #4280.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOUNDERS REALTY INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARK, CECIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2345 POST STREET, #21, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $3,485.34 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,485.34, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
